formulas.name: 1. Human Development Index (HDI) Formula
formulas.variables: LEI: Life Expectancy Index, EI: Education Index, III: Income Index
formulas.notes: To measure the well-being of a country

formulas.name: 2. Global Peace Index (GPI) Formula
formulas.formula: GPI = (Level of Violence + Fear of Crime + Militarization) / 3
formulas.variables: Level of Violence: Homicide rates, Fear of Crime: Crime rates, Militarization: Military expenditure
formulas.notes: To measure the peacefulness of a country

formulas.name: 3. Defense Expenditure as a Percentage of GDP
formulas.variables: Defense Expenditure: Military spending, GDP: Gross Domestic Product
formulas.notes: To measure the allocation of resources to defense

formulas.name: 4. Military Expenditure Ratio
formulas.variables: Military Expenditure: Military spending, Central Government Expenditure: Total government spending
formulas.notes: To measure the priority given to military spending

formulas.name: 5. Human Security Index (HSI) Formula
formulas.formula: HSI = (Economic Security + Food Security + Health Security + Environmental Security + Personal Security) / 5
formulas.variables: Economic Security: Income, Food Security: Access to food, Health Security: Access to healthcare, Environmental Security: Access to clean environment, Personal Security: Protection from crime
formulas.notes: To measure the overall security of individuals

formulas.name: 6. Nuclear Deterrence Strategy
formulas.notes: The strategy of using nuclear weapons as a deterrent to prevent war

formulas.name: 7. Collective Security
formulas.notes: A security arrangement where multiple countries work together to provide security for all members

formulas.name: 8. Security Dilemma
formulas.notes: A situation where one country's efforts to increase its own security reduces the security of another country

formulas.name: 9. Non-Alignment Movement
formulas.notes: A movement of countries that do not align with any major power bloc

formulas.name: 10. National Security
formulas.notes: The protection of a country's interests, values, and institutions
